name: c2c-bff
description: W0 backend-for-frontend that brokers UI calls to the c2c capability services and serves the c2c-ui static bundle.

scripts.test: npm run build && node --test dist/server.test.js dist/outputChangeExplanation.test.js dist/diagnostics.test.js dist/samples.test.js dist/upstream.test.js dist/error-codes.test.js dist/acceptance-fixtures.test.js dist/trust-cases.test.js dist/formatJava.test.js dist/editorExplain.test.js dist/editorTelemetry.test.js dist/cspReport.test.js dist/sessionStore.test.js dist/sessionCookie.test.js dist/sessionRoutes.test.js dist/rateLimit.test.js
